scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx wrangler deploy --define DEPLOY_VERSION:"'$(date +%s)'"
scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build && bunx wrangler deploy --env preview --define DEPLOY_VERSION:"'$(date +%s)'"

vertz.title: Vertz UI — Component Documentation
vertz.description: Interactive component documentation for Vertz UI, built with Vertz itself.
